_command: WD_ISSUE=$(gh issue list --label 'bot:cf-audit-log-watchdog' --json number --jq '.[0].number'); gh issue view "$WD_ISSUE" --json number,title,labels,body,createdAt,state,url > outputs/phase-11/watchdog-alert.json

_expected_shape.title: [CF-AUDIT][WATCHDOG] cf-audit-log-monitor stale ...s
_expected_shape.body:
Last successful run: ...
Elapsed since: ...h
Main workflow: cf-audit-log-monitor.yml
Recovery runbook: docs/30-workflows/issue-408-cf-audit-logs-monitoring/outputs/phase-10/rollback-runbook.md

_notes: watchdog Issue は主 workflow の最終 run id / 経過時間 / 復旧手順 link を含むこと
Token 値や Cloudflare account id を body に含めない
